title: Event Log
description: Event volume, session timeline, and instrument activity from the event bus

list.name: event_type
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT event_type FROM events ORDER BY event_type

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', occurred_at) AS time, split_part(event_type, '.', 1) AS category, count(*) AS cnt FROM events WHERE occurred_at BETWEEN '${__from:date}' AND '${__to:date}' AND (event_type LIKE '${event_type}' OR '${event_type}' = '%') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1
SELECT event_type, count(*) AS cnt FROM events WHERE occurred_at BETWEEN '${__from:date}' AND '${__to:date}' GROUP BY event_type ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT e.session_id, min(e.occurred_at) AS started, max(e.occurred_at) AS ended, count(*) AS event_count, count(DISTINCT e.event_type) AS event_types, count(DISTINCT e.run_id) FILTER (WHERE e.run_id IS NOT NULL) AS runs, (SELECT count(*) FROM channels c WHERE c.session_id = e.session_id) AS channel_samples FROM events e WHERE e.occurred_at BETWEEN '${__from:date}' AND '${__to:date}' GROUP BY e.session_id ORDER BY started DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT occurred_at AS time, event_type, session_id, run_id FROM events WHERE event_type LIKE 'instrument.%' AND occurred_at BETWEEN '${__from:date}' AND '${__to:date}' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 200
SELECT occurred_at AS time, event_type, session_id, run_id FROM events WHERE event_type LIKE 'dialog.%' AND occurred_at BETWEEN '${__from:date}' AND '${__to:date}' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 50
